title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Pedro, Pudding, Unknown person #8 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I love chocolate() is it ok if I eat the chocolate structures here though?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this town, you're allowed to consume as much chocolate as you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But make sure to avoid the "title chocolates" that are used as roofs! Eating those is against the law, because doing so exposes the town to various forms of precipitation that it occasionally gets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest of the things in this town that aren't chocolate are all either personal belongings or items open to public usage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, the Windows are made by "Chancellor Candy" and the pillars by "Chancellor Biscuits".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Too complicated for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't a break, so come back here as soon as possible! GAO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My face would be too easily recognized so I'll remain here on the ship, but I'm a real sucker for chocolate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Request some souvenier chocolates for myself as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Got it~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, straw hat!! quit slacking around!! Hurry up and get into your disguise so that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're looking for Luffy and the others, they already left to explore the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ehhh ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi!! What do you lot think will happen to me if they found out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I brought you all here?! Tread lightly and proceed with caution!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not to worry, finding him won't be an issue because he's sure to stick out like a sore thumb!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a crime!! Someone just ate a cafe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Aand there you go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You've got to be shifting me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it were just the walls, we could've easily repaired the building by adding some more chocolate later...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the entire cafe is gone!! This is ridiculous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Were you two the ones responsible for this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Marsh- Mellows... almonds.. and jelly beans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: consumption of property... this is truly a grievous crime!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to have to write you two up!! Come with me to the station!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But old man, we had a really good reason for doing what we did...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh...? fine, what? Go on, spill it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It was too delicious not to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That does it! You two gluttonous imbeciles are coming with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 'Down to the police station!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad!! They are about to get AR- rested!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Mr. Pedro, violence is not the answer!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Please wait, Mr. Chocolate police officer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: @Harret?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah... if it isn't the proprietor of the Establish- Ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just look at what they've reduced your precious cafe to....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Waz DAT A FRYING GARDED?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OH MY HEAVENS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It appears things have gone from bad to worse!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The owner of the Cafe has arrived !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you?! Leaving so much to go to waste...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You both promised to eat every- thing up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmph!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Cafe "Caramel" owner nitro the jello

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Labiyan the carpet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh? Hey, do you know her?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not at all... who is she?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, am I the only one weirded out by that thing on her shoulder?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was really proud of this part where the jam, chocolate, and biscuits come together too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tug

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why didn't you finish off this part?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: C'mon now! Eat up :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Isn't it yummy?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 56 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
